name: Kindergarten Home Economics & Life Skills — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for choices, needs, simple planning, and contributing to a shared space. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with choices, needs, simple planning, and contributing to a shared space.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

activities.title: A close look at choices, needs, simple planning, and contributing to a shared space
